title: Echo Spyglass
description: Locate vibrations through walls with an Echo Shard Spyglass
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Wunm6vrOWdQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Crafting
Craft an Echo Spyglass with an Echo Shard.

## Usage
Use the Echo Spyglass to locate mobs through walls. This is like having Warden-vision. You will see vibrations whereever mobs are. If you keep the vibrations in view long enough, the mob will begin to glow, showing you its location.
